name: National Livestock Mission: Genetic Improvement of Pig Breeds - Import of Exotic Pig Germplasm
benefit_description: Pattern of Assistance: One time assistance will be provided to the state for import of pig exotic germplasm in the form of live animals on cost sharing basis 60:40 for all States except NER & Himalayan States where it will be 90:10.
details: The "Import of Exotic Pig Germplasm" is a component under the Genetic Improvement of Pig Breeds activity of the Sub-Mission on Breed Development of Livestock and Poultry, part of the National Livestock Mission (NLM). This initiative is introduced by the Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying, under the Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying, Government of India. Under this scheme, the Central Government will assist the States for need based import of pig germplasm to increase
eligibility_text: Eligible Beneficiaries: State Livestock Agencies State Livestock Boards Animal Husbandry Department, State Government
application_url: Step 1: Visit the Official Website of "National Livestock Mission" and click " Apply Here ". Step 2: The following methods of Logging In will be displayed: Login as Entrepreneur Login as Government /
